text.title: prompt-engineering-fundamentals Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for prompt-engineering-fundamentals as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Ambiguous instructions: "Make this text better." or "Summarize this article." without format or focus.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: "Better" is subjective; without a target, the model guesses what improvement means and produces high-variance output.

failure-mode.description: No output format specified for tasks where structure matters.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a format spec, output varies wildly between calls. Specify JSON schema, length, markdown structure, or exact response pattern.

failure-mode.description: Instructions buried in context: mixing background prose with task instructions in a wall of text.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The model prioritizes early and late tokens. Instructions hidden mid-paragraph are often ignored. Use XML delimiters to separate context from instructions.

failure-mode.description: Conflicting instructions: "Be concise but thorough. Brief overview but cover all details. Short but don't leave anything out."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Contradictory requirements confuse the model. Prioritize explicitly: "accuracy over completeness over brevity".

failure-mode.description: No error handling for edge cases: "Extract the price from this text: {text}" with no instruction for missing or multiple prices.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without edge case instructions, the model invents answers. Specify what to return for each failure mode.
